form.label: AI Governance - Overview
form.description: Directory, project, conversation, and data-movement governance across AI providers. Index scope comes from the ai_governance_index macro.

search.query: `ai_governance_index` | stats count by ai.vendor | rename ai.vendor AS vendor | fields vendor
`ai_governance_index` ai.record="user" ai.vendor="$provider$" | rename ai.actor.id AS user_id | stats dc(user_id) AS users
`ai_governance_index` ai.record="group" ai.vendor="$provider$" | rename ai.resource.id AS group_id | stats dc(group_id) AS groups
`ai_governance_index` ai.record="activity" ai.resource.type="project" ai.vendor="$provider$" | rename ai.event_type AS event_type | timechart count by event_type

`ai_governance_index` ai.record="activity" ai.event_type="project_visibility_changed" ai.vendor="$provider$" | rename ai.actor.email AS actor, ai.resource.id AS project_id, raw.visibility AS visibility | table _time, actor, project_id, visibility | sort - _time
`ai_governance_index` ai.record="activity" ai.event_type=org_user_invite_* ai.vendor="$provider$" | rename ai.event_type AS event_type | stats count by event_type | sort event_type

`ai_governance_index` ai.record="activity" ai.event_category="data_export" ai.vendor="$provider$" | rename ai.event_type AS event_type, ai.actor.email AS actor, ai.org.id AS org_id | table _time, event_type, actor, org_id | sort - _time

`ai_governance_index` ai.record="activity" ai.resource.type="chat" ai.vendor="$provider$" | rename ai.event_type AS event_type, ai.actor.email AS actor | stats count by event_type, actor | sort - count

`ai_governance_index` ai.record="activity" ai.event_category="content_access" ai.resource.type="file" ai.event_type=*_uploaded ai.vendor="$provider$" | rename ai.actor.email AS actor, ai.resource.id AS file_id | stats count values(file_id) AS files by actor | sort - count | head 20

`ai_governance_index` ai.record="user" ai.vendor="$provider$" | rename ai.actor.email AS email, raw.full_name AS full_name, ai.actor.role AS role, ai.actor.id AS user_id | sort - _time | dedup user_id | table email, full_name, role, user_id

`ai_governance_index` ai.record="group" ai.vendor="$provider$" | rename raw.name AS name, raw.description AS description, raw.source_type AS source_type, raw.roles AS roles, ai.resource.id AS group_id | sort - _time | dedup group_id | table name, description, source_type, roles, group_id

`ai_governance_index` ai.record="activity" ai.resource.type="memory" ai.vendor="$provider$" | rename ai.event_type AS event_type, ai.actor.email AS actor | stats count by event_type, actor | sort - count

`ai_governance_index` ai.record="activity" ai.event_type=org_invite_link_* ai.vendor="$provider$" | rename ai.event_type AS event_type, ai.actor.email AS actor | table _time, event_type, actor | sort - _time

`ai_governance_index` ai.record="activity" ai.resource.type="integration" ai.vendor="$provider$" | rename ai.event_type AS event_type, ai.actor.email AS actor | stats count by event_type, actor | sort - count
